API Reference

API Reference#

This section provides a detailed reference for all classes, functions, and modules available in the GalSyn package.

Modules:

  • galsyn
    • GalaxySynthesizer
  • config
  • dust
    • bump_amp_from_dust_index()
    • calzetti_dust_Alambda_per_AV()
    • calzetti_dust_klambda()
    • ccm89_dust_Alambda_per_AV()
    • drude_profile()
    • fitzpatrick99_dust_Alambda_per_AV()
    • lmc_gordon2003_dust_Alambda_per_AV()
    • modified_calzetti_dust_Alambda_per_AV()
    • salim18_dust_Alambda_per_AV()
    • smc_gordon2003_dust_Alambda_per_AV()
    • tau_dust_given_z()
    • unresolved_dust_birth_cloud_Alambda_per_AV()
  • galsyn_run_bagpipes
    • dust_reddening_diffuse_ism()
    • generate_images()
    • init_worker()
  • galsyn_run_fsps
    • dust_reddening_diffuse_ism()
    • generate_images()
    • init_worker()
  • imgutils
    • angular_to_physical()
    • convert_flux_map()
    • physical_to_angular()
  • observe
    • GalSynMockObservation_ifu
    • GalSynMockObservation_imaging
  • sfh
    • SFHReconstructor
  • simutils_tng
    • cosmic_times_of_snapshots()
    • cosmic_times_snapshots()
    • download_cutout_parent_halo_hdf5()
    • download_cutout_subhalo_hdf5()
    • get()
    • get_basic_subhalo_properties()
    • get_num_subhalos()
    • get_snap_z()
    • get_snap_z_batch()
    • get_tng_snaps_info()
    • make_sim_file_from_tng_data()
  • ssp_generator_bagpipes
    • generate_ssp_grid_bagpipes()
    • init_ssp_worker()
  • ssp_generator_fsps
    • generate_ssp_grid()
    • init_ssp_worker()
  • utils
    • construct_SFH()
    • cosmo_redshifting()
    • create_hdf5_file()
    • define_cosmo()
    • determine_image_size()
    • doppler_shift_spectrum()
    • filtering()
    • get_2d_density_projection_no_los_binning()
    • get_effective_range()
    • igm_att_inoue()
    • igm_att_madau()
    • interp_age_univ_from_z()
    • make_filter_transmission_text_pixedfit()
    • tau_DLA_LC()
    • tau_DLA_LS()
    • tau_LAF_LC()
    • tau_LAF_LS()
